message:
fix(guard): honor WORKTREES_ENABLED gate in pre-commit/pre-push hooks

The generated pre-commit and pre-push hook scripts defined a GATE variable
from WORKTREES_ENABLED/GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED environment variables, but
never actually used it to exit early when the gate is disabled.

According to AGENTS.md: "Guards exit early when WORKTREES_ENABLED=0"

This fix adds the missing gate check so the hooks exit(0) silently when
neither WORKTREES_ENABLED nor GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED is set to a truthy value.

This makes the hooks non-disruptive by default, only enforcing file
reservation conflict detection when explicitly enabled.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,6 +132,10 @@ def render_precommit_script(archive: ProjectArchive) -> str:
         "# Gate variables (presence) and mode",
         "GATE = (os.environ.get(\"WORKTREES_ENABLED\",\"0\") or os.environ.get(\"GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED\",\"0\") or \"0\")",
         "",
+        "# Exit early if gate is not enabled (WORKTREES_ENABLED=0 and GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED=0)",
+        "if GATE.strip().lower() not in {\"1\",\"true\",\"t\",\"yes\",\"y\"}:",
+        "    sys.exit(0)",
+        "",
         "# Advisory/blocking mode: default to 'block' unless explicitly set to 'warn'.",
         "MODE = (os.environ.get(\"AGENT_MAIL_GUARD_MODE\",\"block\") or \"block\").strip().lower()",
         "ADVISORY = MODE in {\"warn\",\"advisory\",\"adv\"}",
@@ -268,6 +272,11 @@ def render_prepush_script(archive: ProjectArchive) -> str:
         "",
         "# Gate variables (presence) and mode",
         "GATE = (os.environ.get(\"WORKTREES_ENABLED\",\"0\") or os.environ.get(\"GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED\",\"0\") or \"0\")",
+        "",
+        "# Exit early if gate is not enabled (WORKTREES_ENABLED=0 and GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED=0)",
+        "if GATE.strip().lower() not in {\"1\",\"true\",\"t\",\"yes\",\"y\"}:",
+        "    sys.exit(0)",
+        "",
         "MODE = (os.environ.get(\"AGENT_MAIL_GUARD_MODE\",\"block\") or \"block\").strip().lower()",
         "ADVISORY = MODE in {\"warn\",\"advisory\",\"adv\"}",
         "if (os.environ.get(\"AGENT_MAIL_BYPASS\",\"0\") or \"0\").strip().lower() in {\"1\",\"true\",\"t\",\"yes\",\"y\"}:",
